creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch: https://people.freebsd.org/~sunpoet/patch/py-ipykernel.txt

Affected ports:
- devel/py-ipympl : makc@FreeBSD.org
- devel/py-ipyparallel : python@FreeBSD.org
- devel/py-ipywidgets : swills@FreeBSD.org
- devel/py-jupyter-client : python@FreeBSD.org
- devel/py-jupyter_console : swills@FreeBSD.org
- devel/py-nbclassic : sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
- devel/py-qtconsole : swills@FreeBSD.org
- devel/py-spyder-kernels : rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
- math/py-mathics : thierry@FreeBSD.org
- math/sage : thierry@FreeBSD.org
- science/py-jupyter_jsmol : thierry@FreeBSD.org
- www/py-notebook : python@FreeBSD.org

Above ports are tested OK except math/sage (marked BROKEN, failed in configure).
